title: The data returned by the select statement is incorrect
description: ## Bug Report Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks! ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) ```sql CREATE TABLE `test` ( `id` varchar(32) NOT NULL, UNIQUE KEY `id` (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin; INSERT INTO `test` VALUES ('8145308033243873280','8145308033243873281','9145308033243873281'); ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) ### 3. What did you see instead (Required) ### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required) 7.x
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_fuzz ( id varchar(32) NOT NULL, value int DEFAULT NULL, UNIQUE (id) );
SELECT * FROM test_fuzz WHERE id = '8145308033243873280' OR value IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_join ( id varchar(32) NOT NULL, description text, PRIMARY KEY (id) );
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES ('8145308033243873280', 'Test description 1'), ('8145308033243873281', 'Test description 2');
key_bug_features: Incorrect data returned by select statement
